Document Storage
Configure where uploaded documents (bill attachments, JE attachments, documents module) are stored. Files are always saved in Supabase Storage by default. Enable a cloud integration to also sync to Google Drive or SharePoint.
🗄️
Supabase Storage
Default · Always active
Active
📁
Google Drive
Sync attachments to Drive folder
Not connected
☁️
SharePoint / OneDrive
Sync to SharePoint document library
Not connected
📁 Google Drive Configuration
From the folder URL: drive.google.com/drive/folders/[FOLDER_ID]
Create a Service Account in Google Cloud Console → IAM → Service Accounts → Add Key. Share the target folder with the service account email.
☁️ SharePoint / OneDrive Configuration
Setup: Register an app in Azure Active Directory → API Permissions → SharePoint → Sites.ReadWrite.All. Copy Tenant ID, Client ID, and generate a Client Secret.

Overtime Settings (OBBBA Compliant)

OBBBA allows straight-time for OT in qualifying states
Federal tip credit minimum is $2.13/hr. Tips must bring total to at least federal minimum wage.
Based on IRS Publication 15-T (Circular E) — 2025 Percentage Method Tables for Automated Payroll Systems
Total from W-4 Step 3 (e.g. $2,000 per qualifying child)

Estimated itemized deductions exceeding standard deduction
Configure recurring deductions for this employee. Pre-tax deductions reduce federal taxable wages before withholding is calculated.

Update Inventory from Bill
📦 Bill contains purchasable items — update inventory?
The bill you just saved may contain inventory items. Review each line below and link to an inventory item to automatically post a receipt transaction. Skip lines that are services or non-inventory expenses.
Match Bill to Purchase Order
🔗 Open POs found for this vendor — match to a PO?
Matching a bill to a PO closes the purchase order and links the transactions for audit trail purposes.
Import Hours into Payroll Run
⏱ Import approved time entries for this pay period?
Hours logged in the Projects module for this pay period will be pulled in automatically. Each employee's hours are summed and pre-filled below.
Set a period and click Load Hours
